pages.text: Your settlement's main &6banner&r is raised automatically when you found it. It is more than decoration: while it stands, your town hall and all work continue. If the banner falls, the town hall is locked and every job halts until it is restored.
War in Bannerbound is about denial and tempo, not elimination. You raid, blockade, and pressure a rival to slow them and force terms — you are not meant to wipe another civilization off the map.
War doctrines like Glory Tales and Rallying Speeches give a sharp, temporary surge in obedience and morale at a cost. Use them to win a moment, then return to building.
